title: Aby Pokemon Server
body:
## Egirl_Aby Pokémon Server Mod pack




This is a Pokémon Mod pack built on **Minecraft 1.21.1** and powered by the latest **Cobblemon mod**

This modpack is based round Pokémon and is designed for a community server while hopfully keeping things simple and fresh for every player it will hopfully supply some good challenges 

This Modpack also aims to allow the player to have a good Pokamon expearence with just a small quality-of-life addons while still allowing to particapate in server events and have fun.


_Things included in this pack_

 

- Cobblemon

- Cobblemon: Ride on! (Allowing you to ride your Pokémon)

- Waystones (To be able to get back to your favourite locations)

- Xaero's World + Mini map  

- Easy NPC for npc all your NPC interactions

- JEI (will help you have just trhe items you need)

+more

 

This pack is mainly built for the Leafeon Island community


If you are also looking for a server host why not consider Pebble Host threw the link below

https://billing.pebblehost.com/aff.php?aff=2705
